data.description: BUILDPLAN M3 / WS-4a/b (BUILDPLAN id MA-10). toolSchemas.ts zod schemas per MCP tool result; FalconMcpClient.call (mcp.ts:57 - the method is call, not callTool) becomes schema-required and validates before returning; migrate all call sites; proposePoisonFix gets real schemas reusing Issue/PoisonReport from types.ts (a TriageReport type does NOT exist); remove the TriageOutput-as-any cast at triage.ts:134. ACs: AC-12, AC-15. Depends: MA-07. Serialize: types.ts, lib/mcp.ts. Size M.
data.title: Schema-validated MCP client boundary

data.body:
CODE REVIEW (own-reviewer fallback — `lattice code-review` is not a command in this lattice version; reviewed via git log origin/main..HEAD --stat + per-file diffs at 37c7fcd)

Verdict: PASS

Scope reviewed: 16 files, +694/-90 vs origin/main (65142ba).

Critical: none.

Major: none.

Minor / notes:
1. falcon-detective/src/lib/mcp.ts:14-27 — McpValidationError matches SPEC WS-4's literal `McpValidationError(toolName, zodIssues)` signature; message includes tool name + per-path mismatches (AC-15 "structured error naming the tool and the mismatch"). Verified taxonomy alignment: protocol-kind ToolErrors (not-found/invalid-argument/timeout, MA-17) reject inside the SDK before validation; result-level isError keeps its pre-existing throw — covered by an explicit passthrough test.
2. falcon-detective/src/lib/toolSchemas.ts — schema key order deliberately mirrors the serde struct field order in falcon-mcp/src/tools/*.rs, so triage's JSON.stringify-into-prompt output (cassette hash input) is byte-stable vs the pre-change raw payloads. Residual risk: e2e cassette replay (H-2, excluded from the fast suite, needs falcon-mcp binary) was not executable in this environment; flagged for the orchestrator's harness run.
3. scripts/debt-gates.sh gate_no_handler_any greps comments as well as code (same style as the existing AC-7/AC-8/AC-13 gates); one self-inflicted comment hit was found and reworded during development — the gate demonstrably fires.
4. tests reach the handler input validator via `__definition` — consistent with the existing proposeBugFix/triage test pattern; AC-13's gate scopes src/ only.
5. grep-verified: zero remaining `.call(`/`.call<` sites with the old 2-arg signature in src/, tests/, workflows/, cli.ts.

Gates at 37c7fcd: npm test 87/87 (15 files); npx tsc --noEmit clean; biome check clean (44 files); scripts/debt-gates.sh 8/8 PASS including the new no-handler-any (AC-12).

AC mapping: AC-12 — proposePoisonFix Input now Issue/PoisonReport/Excerpt (+ optional PreviousFailure); triage's `as any` cast removed at source (gemini CallOptions.schema: ZodType<T>); handlers grep-clean; malformed-input unit tests added; H-9 gate appended. AC-15 — call requires schema, validates before return, McpValidationError names tool+mismatch, mocked-malformed test present, per-tool-result schema tests table-driven over TOOL_RESULT_SCHEMAS.

PR open: https://github.com/mrojas54/maltese-agent/pull/40 (base main, head claude/ma-10-mcp-schemas, HEAD 37c7fcd013047de277816a2539f5ba60ab975ebb). All gates green: npm test 87/87 (15 files), tsc --noEmit clean, biome clean, debt-gates.sh 8/8 PASS (incl. new no-handler-any AC-12 gate). Review verdict PASS via own-reviewer fallback (`lattice code-review` is not a command in the installed lattice CLI — see review-role comment).

EXPORTED INTERFACES for dependent tickets (MA-12 / MA-13 / MA-18):

1. falcon-detective/src/lib/toolSchemas.ts (NEW)
   - Schema consts (each with a same-named inferred type, types.ts convention):
     CargoMessage, CargoCheckResult, CargoTestCase, CargoTestResult, CargoClippyResult,
     FsReadResult, FsWriteResult, FsListResult, FsApplyPatchResult, FsMatch, FsSearchResult,
     WorktreeAddResult, GitCommitResult, OkResult (git_add), ExecRunResult
   - TOOL_RESULT_SCHEMAS: const record { cargo_check, cargo_test, cargo_clippy, fs_read, fs_write, fs_list, fs_apply_patch, fs_search, git_worktree_add, git_add, git_commit, exec_run } -> schema
   - type ToolName = keyof typeof TOOL_RESULT_SCHEMAS

2. falcon-detective/src/lib/mcp.ts (CHANGED — breaking signature)
   - FalconMcpClient.call<T>(toolName: string, args: Record<string, unknown>, schema: z.ZodType<T>): Promise<T> — schema is REQUIRED (3rd arg); T inferred from schema. Mocked handlers in MA-13 tests must accept/ignore the 3rd argument.
   - class McpValidationError extends Error { readonly toolName: string; readonly issues: readonly z.core.$ZodIssue[] } — thrown on result-shape mismatch (success results only); protocol errors (MA-17 kinds) still surface as SDK McpError, isError results as plain Error.

3. falcon-detective/src/lib/gemini.ts (CHANGED)
   - CallOptions<T>.schema: ZodType<T> (was ZodSchema<T>) — z.preprocess pipes now accepted without casts.

4. falcon-detective/src/handlers/proposePoisonFix.ts — Input is now z.object({ issue: Issue, report: PoisonReport, excerpts: z.array(Excerpt), previousFailure: PreviousFailure.optional() }) (all reused from types.ts). MA-12's propose-handler factory should build on these shapes.

DRIFT FLAGGED: mcp.ts:57 -> call is at mcp.ts:60 pre-change; triage.ts:134 cast -> found at triage.ts:168; both removed/migrated. debt-gates.sh gained the AC-12 gate in this PR per SPEC R-5's append-in-own-PR rule (R-5's inline WS-4 enumeration lists only AC-22 — treated AC-12's own "grep gate, H-9" text as controlling). Residual: e2e cassette replay (H-2) not executable here (no falcon-mcp binary); schema key order matches serde field order to keep triage prompt JSON cassette-stable.
Merged via operator-authorized merge train (PR #40, merge commit 6916083, CI green verified pre-merge).
